description: Create a reusable clinical text template in FreeMED (Username: admin, Password: admin) named 'Normal Physical Exam'. The template body must contain the following text: General: Well developed, well nourished, no acute distress. HEENT: Normocephalic, atraumatic, PERRLA. Cardiovascular: Regular rate and rhythm, no murmurs, rubs, or gallops. Lungs: Clear to auscultation bilaterally. Abdomen: Soft, non-tender, non-distended. Extremities: No edema or cyanosis. Save the template to the system.
